_publications._publicationTitle: Neural Crest-Specific TSC1 Deletion in Mice Leads to Sclerotic Craniofacial Bone Lesion.

_contextSnippet: P0-Cre mice had similar frontal bone thickness compared to wild type controls, indicating that P0-Cre itself did not cause the sclerotic phenotype
details: P0-Cre mice had similar frontal bone thickness compared to wild type controls, indicating P0-Cre itself did not cause sclerotic phenotype
